title: I have created an item view, which works fine in desktop but when I open it in iPad or android it says, "the view is currently unavailable on mobile go to desktop to use it" any solution available?
excerpt: please refer the image, I have also searched this question in the community and couldn’t find answer.

posts.author: ankitnegi (ankit negi)
posts.cookedHtml:
please refer the image, I have also searched this question in the community and couldn’t find answer.

20231108_1148391080×1851 125 KB

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ankitnegi !

Some views are unfortunately not viewable in the mobile app, as the message shown to you indicates.

The monday team is aware and I believe it is on the roadmap to eventually be able to see these views on the mobile app as well.

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: ankitnegi (ankit negi)
posts.cookedHtml: is there anything which can be done to make it possible for now?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml: I am afraid until this is on rollout that no.
